creator: Karl.Dietz@triplan.com
text:
Terry Ewing reported a bug in dnsutl that made Peter Miller release
	a new version. Includes also additional functionality.
	dnsutl-1.3 will core dump in some cases

	reported by: Terry Ewing (terrye@deepwell.com)
	fixed and release of new version by: Peter Miller
				(millerp@canb.auug.org.au)
	ported to FreeBSD by: me

Fix: apply this patch
	
How-To-Repeat: 
	see test for "missing ORIGIN" bug in distfile
